name: T3EX Global Holdings Corp.
summary: T3EX Global Holdings Corp., an investment holding company, provides integrated logistics services in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, Eastern Asia, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Sea Export and Air Export. It offers international freight forwarding services, such as ocean freight and air freight services; and domestic logistics services, including sea and air freight import/export customs clearance, bonded area customs clearance and filing for re-import/re-export, logistics park of export and import transit operations, hazardous goods or tank container customs clearance, remote customs clearance and declaration, customs seal clearance operations, and inspection and quarantine. The company's domestic logistics services also comprise temporary warehousing for import and export goods, label replacement, sorting and repacking, pallet, warehouse space leasing, inventory management reports, and customized delivery services. It also provides warehousing and transportation; supply chain solutions; and e-commerce logistics solutions. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
